STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OF DISMISSAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MITCHELL, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HBO & CO., INC. (NOMINAL) BEAR STEARNS & CO ARTHUR ANDERSEN LLP MCCALL, CHARLES W PULIDO, MARK A BERGONZI, ALBERT J GILBERTSON, JAY P ECKERT, ALFRED C III INCARNATI, PHILIP A IRBY, ALTON F III JACOBS, M CHRISTINE MAYO, GERALD E NAPIER, JAMES V WEGMILLER, DONALD C MCKESSON HBOC INC (NOMINAL) PLAINTIFF SHALL NOT APPLY FOR AN AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES IN THIS OR ANY OTHER ACTION. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEYS' FEES, COSTS AND EXPENSES. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE ALL PARTIES WITH A COPY OF THIS JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
